game_name: Leisure Suit Larry in the Land of the Lounge Lizards

sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel movement documentation found in sources

tier_notes: Leisure Suit Larry is a point-and-click graphic adventure game using Sierra's AGI engine. It is not a platformer or action game with precise physics mechanics. Movement is controlled via directional keys and text commands rather than continuous physics-based mechanics. No jump, gravity, acceleration, or sub-pixel movement systems are documented. This game does not have measurable physics parameters typical of action/platformer games.
sources_used: Wikipedia - Leisure Suit Larry in the Land of the Lounge Lizards
